title: Richmond, KY — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Richmond, KY: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Richmond is a city in KY with a population of 35,000. Home of Eastern Kentucky University with access to Berea and the Daniel Boone National Forest.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
